description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Tests that runs a suite of very-long tests. The workflow is triggered manually via a workflow dispatch. It consists of multiple jobs: get-date to fetch the current date, testlib-very-long-tests to run various long tests in parallel on self-hosted Linux runners with a 3-day timeout, gpu-tests to run GPU tests on a different self-hosted runner, and dramsys-tests for DRAMSys checks. Each job checks out the code, sets up a container environment, and uploads test results as artifacts.
